parameters.name: sourceApplicationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the source application

parameters.name: targetApplicationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target application

responseMessages.message: Search migrated servers type parameter must be either internal, external or both.

operations.summary: Update server mappings for source and target applications
operations.notes:
Use id=-1 for target_network_object if new mapping is "Not Needed".
If the source is specified and the target is empty, the mapping that is currently configured will be deleted.

parameters.name: sourceApplicationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the source application

parameters.name: targetApplicationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target application

responseMessages.message: Server mappings were modified.
Source network object cannot be empty.
Source network object is not valid
Target network object is not valid
Source and target network objects must be internal or external both.
Cannot use DEVICE application resources as external network objects.
Source network object with ID must be used by any connection.
Cannot remove mapping of network object with ID because it has never been mapped.
Cannot migrate application to itself.
Cannot map to ANY network object.
Cannot map Internet network object.
Cannot map to Internet network object.
Target network object ID must be in the same customer as the target application.
No available licenses. Ask your SecureApp administrator for assistance.
This application is publishing and therefore cannot be edited. Redo your changes after publishing is completed.
There is no application with the specified ID.
Server with ID was not found.

operations.summary: Copy application servers and connections to another application.
operations.notes:
This API can be used to:
1. Create applications based on a blueprint (template).
2. Copy applications between environments (dev, test, prod).
3. Migrate applications between data-centers.

Before migrating make sure to map servers and connections to applications (if any exist). This migration uses the configuration specified in the other API calls.

parameters.name: sourceApplicationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the source application

parameters.name: targetApplicationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target application

responseMessages.message: Application was migrated.
Cannot migrate a decommissioned application.
Cannot migrate to a decommissioned application.
Cannot migrate an application to itself.
Cannot edit target DEVICE application.
Access is denied
No available licenses. Ask your SecureApp administrator for assistance.
You do not have permissions to edit this application.
This application is publishing and therefore cannot be edited. Redo your changes after publishing is completed.
There is no application with the specified ID.
The source application has no connections to migrate.
You cannot migrate the application because not all servers are mapped.
You cannot migrate the application because not all connections to application are mapped.
You cannot migrate the application because one of the interfaces in the original application has been changed and has not been published.

@href.description: The location of the referenced object

source_connection_to_application.description: The source application's connection to application

name.description: The name of the referenced object

type.description: The type of the referenced object

display_name.description: The display name of the referenced object

management_domain.description: The management domain from which the referenced object comes from

uid.description: The unique identifier of the referenced object

link.description: The data structure that contains the href tag, which sets the location of the referenced object in the SecureApp database

member.description: List of references to a DM_INLINE group members
